refresh_source: Overnight wake block ~21:15 ET 2026-05-20 — NVDA AMC confirmed. Updated from stale 5/14 file.
catalyst_summary: NVDA EARNINGS SELL-THE-NEWS (highest significance). NVIDIA reported massive Q1 FY2027 beat after close 5/20: EPS $1.87 vs $1.78 est (+5.1%), Revenue $81.62B vs $79.2B est (+3%). Data center $75.2B (92% of revenue, doubled YoY). Gross margin 75.0%. Q2 guidance $91B (±2%), raised dividend $0.01->$0.25 (25x), $80B buyback authorized. Despite the MASSIVE beat on all fronts, NVDA stock declined AH: $223.33 close -> $220.40 AH (-1.31% to -2.83%). Classic SELL-THE-NEWS on the most anticipated earnings in the market. Implication for SPY 5/21: NVDA is ~5.5% of S&P 500. AH weakness from biggest AI name = tech-sector drag + sentiment shift from 'AI rally continuation' to 'beat fully priced in.' SPY already reflected this: closed 741.29, AH 737.82 (-$3.47 from close), AH high exactly 738.129 = rejected 738.10 *** Carry resistance (L59 1-bar close-ceiling confirmed). BEAR ribbon in AH (Fast 738.06 < Pivot 738.66 < Slow 739.19, spread 113c).

primary_catalyst.name: NVIDIA (NVDA) Q1 FY2027
primary_catalyst.description: NVDA beat EPS ($1.87 vs $1.78 est), beat revenue ($81.62B vs $79.2B est), strong Q2 guidance ($91B). But AH reaction: NVDA down -1.31% to -2.83% from close ($223.33 -> $220.40). SELL THE NEWS pattern confirmed. NVDA weight in SPY ~5.5% — AH selling creates direct drag on SPY open. Sentiment channel: 'AI rally fully priced in' narrative accelerating.
primary_catalyst.spy_impact: BEARISH. SPY already at 737.82 AH (below 738.10 *** Carry). NVDA sell-the-news reinforces the AH bear signal. Bull scenario requires NVDA to reverse and SPY to reclaim 738.10+ — low probability given extent of the beat that still produced selling.
primary_catalyst.fragility: Pre-market recovery possible if NVDA call goes well or institutional buying absorbs the AH selling. Check 08:15 ET Swarm output and 08:30 ET premarket chart before confirming bias.

secondary_catalysts.name: Initial Jobless Claims + Philadelphia Fed Manufacturing Survey
secondary_catalysts.description: DOUBLE DATA EVENT at 08:30 ET. (1) Initial Jobless Claims: consensus ~220K-240K. Hot (>250K) = recession concern + equity weak. Cool (<210K) = labor strong + equity supportive. (2) Philadelphia Fed Manufacturing Survey (Philly Fed PMI): measures manufacturing activity in mid-Atlantic region. Negative surprises compound NVDA drag. With NVDA already selling, a hot claims print or weak Philly Fed could accelerate the bear move. Cool/strong data could provide a relief bounce bid — but NVDA headwind limits upside.
secondary_catalysts.fragility: first 5 min of RTH always volatile after 08:30 double-data events

secondary_catalysts.description: No FOMC meeting this week. Fed speakers possible but none confirmed at 21:15 ET 5/20. Premarket should check for any 08:00-12:00 ET Fed commentary.

SPY had massive +$7.52 bull day on 5/20 (733.77 -> 741.29). Post-mega-gap rally day + sell-the-news catalyst = mean-reversion pressure. Traders who bought the 5/20 bull run may take profits. Adds to bear tilt.

vix_expectation: 5/20 RTH VIX likely compressed during the +$7.52 bull day (end of day VIX probably 16-17 range given the rally magnitude). AH ribbon bear (spread 113c) with NVDA selling suggests VIX could TICK UP in 5/21 premarket. If VIX opens above 17.30 and ticking up = v15 BEAR gate opens immediately. Watch for VIX 16.50-18.50 range. BEAR setups favored if VIX > 17.30 at first tick.

key_levels_for_session.critical_level_note: The gating level. AH rejected exactly at 738.129 (1 bar close-ceiling). If SPY opens below 738.10 and rallies to test it -> BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON candidate. If SPY opens above 738.10 and holds -> bull scenario alive but needs to break 741.29 PDC for continuation.
key_levels_for_session.bear_scenario: SPY opens near 737-738 -> tests 738.10 -> fails to close above -> ENTER short, target 735.40 then 733.77. HS watcher (WATCH_STABLE, 3 live wins needed) would fire if ribbon BEAR + wicks near 738.10. BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON primary engine signal.
key_levels_for_session.bull_scenario: NVDA recovers premarket, SPY gaps up above 738.10, holds 738.10 as support -> BULL enter target 741.29/741.61. Low probability given NVDA sell-the-news overnight.
key_levels_for_session.no_trade_scenario: SPY opens between 737.50-738.50 with no clear directional momentum in first 15 min -> wait for break of 738.10 or 737.26 before entering.

implication_for_setups.bearish_setup: FAVORED. NVDA sell-the-news + SPY below 738.10 Carry = bear pressure. BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON fires when: SPY tests 738.10 -> bar closes below -> ribbon BEAR (already in AH) -> volume >= 1.5x. Set alerts at 738.10. HS watcher (WATCH_STABLE, H+WF+RF all Y, 0/3 live wins) prime candidate to accumulate today.
implication_for_setups.bullish_setup: LOW PROBABILITY. Bull scenario requires NVDA recovery AND SPY break above 741.29 PDC. With NVDA sell-the-news confirmed, the burden of proof is higher. Only enter bull if SPY opens above 738.10 AND holds it for 2+ bars AND ribbon flips BULL with spread >= 30c.
implication_for_setups.watcher_observation: Today is Day 1 of live watcher accumulation (all 13 at 0/X live wins as of premarket). BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON + HS watcher (if HS forms near 738.10) are prime observation targets. Close-ceiling watcher may also fire if 738.10 gets tested multiple times without closing above (N>=3 bars = CLOSE_CEILING_DISTRIBUTION_FADE signal).
implication_for_setups.close_ceiling_fade: HIGH ALERT: If SPY spends 3+ bars testing 738.10 without a close above it, close_ceiling_fade_watcher fires. This is the L59 pattern live. Watch 738.10 closely in first 60 min.

watch_for_reversal: NVDA gaps up strongly in premarket (above $225) -> bear thesis weakens, need SPY to also recover above 741 before entering bull
Initial NVDA call transcript shows unexpected negative comment (H100 restrictions, demand slowdown) -> ACCELERATE bear
SPY gaps down below 735.40 *** support at open -> potential trend-day-down; enter puts on first bear bar after 09:35
VIX > 19 at open -> LBFS watcher (high-vol floor) alert, momentum_accel_highvol watcher becomes relevant
SPY opens above 738.86 (flipped support level) -> bear thesis on hold, wait for rejection at 741.29 instead

no_trade_windows_added_for_today.reason: First-bar noise on NVDA reaction gap
Standard pre-entry gate per v15 params

swarm_note: Gamma_SwarmPremarket fires 08:15 ET (first 13-agent live fire). data_fetcher will pull live TV + Alpaca data. synthesis_agent v5.1 will incorporate this NVDA catalyst context. Swarm output should show BEARISH or conditional bias. If swarm disagrees (shows BULL), investigate why before taking bull setups.
